response.justification: Candidate has ~14 years of solid software engineering experience across multiple stacks and some informal leadership (workshops, founding GISCollective, organizing dojos), but the resume shows no formal people-management or team-leadership tenure, no developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure role at scale, and no mobile-platform ecosystem experience. The role explicitly requires 2+ years people management and 3+ years building developer tools — both are missing or only weakly implied.
strengths: Deep, polyglot engineering background (TS/Node, DLang, C/C++, Java, Swift) with 14+ years
Strong testing/craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, Selenium course, Fluent-Asserts, Trial test runner)
Has built developer-facing tooling (MCP code generators, D test runner, GitLab/CI setup, DSWS)
concerns: No formal people-management experience — IC titles throughout, no direct reports mentioned
No mobile-platform-ecosystem or large-scale build-systems/test-infrastructure org experience
No evidence of leading organizational change or managing roadmaps for a productivity team

key_factors.factor: No mobile platform / build-systems org experience
